'''Wicko District''' was an area of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] near the [[Temple district/Legends|Temple Precinct]]. Its [[Wicko District Garbage Pit|garbage pit]] was used as the location for illegal [[Pit racing|wing-racing]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rogue Planet]]'' {{1st|in book}}
*[[Republic 46|''Republic'' 46]]
*''[[Anakin: Apprentice]]''
*''[[Evasive Action: Prey]]'' {{Mo}}
